pi_items.source: install_gretl.sh lines 184-246 confirm source: Hill, Griffiths and Lim household survey data

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the food.gdt dataset, which contains real household survey data from Hill, Griffiths and Lim (2018) Principles of Econometrics, 5th ed., Table 2.1, with 40 observations of weekly food expenditure and income. The MLE model regresses food_exp on income with normal likelihood. Computed MLE estimates: b0=79.89 (within [65.0, 105.0]), b1=12.31 (within [7.0, 14.0]), sigma=28.38 (below minimum 35.0). The sigma expected range appears incorrectly specified.
